EmailTemplate.name: Welcome To uLab v2
EmailTemplate.subject: Welcome to uLab Systems!
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Welcome to uLab®
Hello {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for choosing uLab to support your clear aligner needs for your patients. Whether you order uSmile™ aligners from our Memphis based facility or print aligners in-office, you have control over the treatment plan and the process. Getting started is simple:
Click the link below to begin Choose a password Set your secret recovery questions Your account is set up!
{!Contact.Activation_URL__c} This link will expire in seven days.
If you have any questions please call us at +1 (866) 900-8522 or email us at support@ulabsystems.com.
Happy Treatment Planning! The uLab Team
We’re here to help. Call +1 (866)-900-8522 or Email support@ulabsystems.com
Privacy Policy | Terms of Use | ulabsystems.com
© 2026 uLab Systems, Inc. All Rights Reserved. uLab Systems, uSmile, uAssist and uView are trademarks and uLab and uDesign are registered trademarks of uLab Systems, Inc.
